proposal_summary: This Constitutional AIP proposes to upgrade Arbitrum One and Arbitrum Nova to ArbOS 40 "Callisto", which includes relevant Ethereum Execution Layer changes from the Pectra upgrade (EIP-7702, EIP-2537, EIP-2935) and a minor fix for Arbitrum Stylus.

claimed_actions.raw_action: updating the WASM module root and scheduling the ArbOS Upgrade
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Trigger activation of ArbOS 40 Callisto at epoch timestamp: 1750176000
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: This proposal payload will contain the on-chain changes, including updating the WASM module root and scheduling the ArbOS Upgrade... will trigger the activation of ArbOS 40 Callisto at epoch timestamp: `1750176000`

claimed_complexity.reason: ArbOS upgrade is equivalent of a hard fork involving core WASM module changes and node updates.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: On a high level, an ArbOS upgrade can be interpreted as Arbitrum’s equivalent of a hard fork. ... large, complex upgrades (like ArbOS upgrades)

limitations: No specific target addresses are disclosed in the proposal text.
The exact payload repository address is mentioned as a github link rather than an on-chain address.
